corrections.text: The article describes the patch series as sent 'by José Marchesi of Oracle.' The cited LWN article (lwn.net/Articles/1003916/), to which the attribution is anchored, identifies José Marchesi but does not state his employer; no cited source supports the 'of Oracle' affiliation. The affiliation should be treated as unverified by the article's sources.

Four of the article's six sources fall outside the editorial source allowlist: gcc.gnu.org (the GCC 16 changes page and release-series page), conf.gnu-tools-cauldron.org (the GNU Tools Cauldron 2025 talk page), and mail-archive.com (the gcc-patches V6 cover letter). These are appropriate primary sources for a compiler release, and the release date and the fact that the Algol 68 frontend shipped are independently corroborated by the allowlisted LWN (lwn.net) coverage. Noted here for provenance transparency.
